oshiSkill.name: ちょっとまつたけ～♪
oshiSkill.description: [1/Turn]Reveal 1 event with #Mushroom from your deck, and add it to hand. Then, shuffle the deck.

spOshiSkill.name: あなたの世界を広げに行こう
spOshiSkill.description: [1/Game]Send the top card of your cheer deck to your <Juufuutei Raden>. Return 1 card with #Mushroom from your archive to hand.

skills.name: 寄ってらっしゃい見てらっしゃい
今日もあなたのそばに -らでん-

name: Juufuutei Raden
collabEffect: 一服朝っぱらでん : If you went second and it is your first turn, send the top card of your cheer deck to your back holomem.

skills.name: 散歩でもいかがですかな？

name: Juufuutei Raden
giftEffect: 体力作り頑張るぞー！！！！！ : During your opponent's turn, when this holomem is downed, you may reattach 1 of this holomem's cheers to your other holomem.

skills.name: そろそろ始めちゃいますか
ちょいと一席付き合ってみませんか？

name: Juufuutei Raden
collabEffect: 旅の前日 : Archive the top card of your deck. You may place 1 Debut holomem from your archive on stage.

skills.name: この博物館おもしろそう！

name: Juufuutei Raden
giftEffect: 薄明 : When this holomem downed your opponent's holomem, restore 20 HP to this holomem.

skills.name: きのこ狩り
skills.description: If you have used an event with #Mushroom this turn, this Arts gets +10.

name: Juufuutei Raden
bloomEffect: ザ・破天荒 : [Center Position Only]During this turn, this holomem gets Arts+20.

skills.name: 伝統と革新をあなたに

name: Matsutake Dance
ability: Choose 1 <Juufuutei Raden> on your stage. During this turn, the chosen holomem gets Arts+10. If the chosen holomem has 3 or more cheers, that holomem gets Arts+20 instead.
